summary: Frontend testing of rewritten FoundationSection.jsx with drastic scroll animations and canvas particle effect. All 8 specified test criteria passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Two 404 errors in console (favicon/manifest assets) — unrelated to FoundationSection
Framer Motion container position warning: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position' — non-critical, animation still works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: FoundationSection fully working: philosophy-section data-testid present, canvas element inside section, 3 images (banner/circle/square) in DOM, content card heading 'Leadership Is Not a Strategy. It Is a State of Being.' visible. At scroll 400px: card opacity=0 (correct — card not assembled yet), circle opacity=1. At scroll 900px: heading visible with opacity=1. No JS errors. Hero section loads correctly with 'What Shifts Within You, Shifts Everything' headline.

test_results.Content card heading visible at scroll 9: PASS - 'Leadership Is Not a Strategy. It Is a State of Being.'
